content.text:
All 8 tests pass. The existing implementation already correctly handles the L-shape reproduction case because it uses the standard Game of Life rules (a dead cell with exactly 3 live neighbors becomes alive).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No new code needed. The existing `nextGeneration` function in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-51-02_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts` already handles the reproduction rule via the `survives` helper (`liveNeighbors === 3`).
- Result: All 8 tests pass.
- Approach: This is the minimum because the previous Green phases for the blinker and "3-in-row" tests already forced a generalized neighbor-counting solution. The L-shape test exercises the same dead-cell-with-3-neighbors path that's already implemented; no code change is required.
